title: swagger documentation updates
body:
adhere closer to the spec by using description and summary fields and
also ensuring that the id is unique to avoid collision between generic
and libpod endpoints.

also, make swagger output work with redoc which seems to display our
information better for our needs.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
> The v2 merge introduced new lint errors which we need to fix first.

I traced it down. `make lint` is using the old metalinter while `make validate` is using golangci-lint which in turn has quite some linters disabled. I'll open a PR to clean it up and enable more linters.

@vrothberg Short answer is spec does all defaults.

  name: debug
          schema:
            type: integer
            enum: [0, 1]
            default: 0

We would need to test, that it's parsed and then passed to the generator correctly to allow reDoc to display.

/cc @baude
